title: Specklinia maguirei
taxonomy: Specklinia maguirei is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is classified within the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. Specklinia maguirei is native to South America and is known for its unique characteristics and adaptations. The classification of Specklinia maguirei is further divided into its kingdom, division, class, order, family, genus, and species, which are Plantae, Liliopsida, Asparagales, Orchidaceae, Specklinia, and S. maguirei respectively.
